mapper.sql: select stat_time, stop_name, line_name, zone_type, time_period, boarding_count, alighting_count, net_flow, load_factor, yoy_rate, stat_year, stat_month, stat_day, stat_hour from fact_station_flow
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(stat_time) as date, SUM(boarding_count + alighting_count) as dailyFlow, AVG(load_factor) as avgLoadFactor FROM fact_station_flow WHERE stat_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(stat_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stat_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') as hour, SUM(boarding_count + alighting_count) as hourlyFlow, AVG(load_factor) as avgLoadFactor FROM fact_station_flow WHERE stat_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hours} HOUR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(stat_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') ORDER BY hour ASC
